name: Shredded Chocolate Banana Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Butter or spray a 9x5x3-inch loaf pan with non-stick cooking spray; set aside.
2. Preheat oven to 325°F.
3. Sift flour, baking soda, baking powder, and salt onto a sheet of wax paper.
4. In a bowl, stir 1 teaspoon of the sifted mixture with grated chocolate; set aside.
5. Mash bananas in a bowl and stir in half-and-half and vanilla extract; set aside.
6. In the bowl of an electric mixer, cream butter and shortening on moderate speed for 3 to 4 minutes.
7. Raise speed to moderately high and add half of sugar, beating for 1 minute.
8. Add remaining sugar and beat another minute longer, scraping down sides and bottom of the bowl.
9. Add eggs one at a time, beating well after each addition.
10. Blend in banana mixture on low speed.
11. On low speed, blend in flour mixture in two additions, beating just until particles are absorbed.
12. Stir chocolate by hand.
13. Pour batter into prepared pan and scrape to fill.
14. Bake for 1 hour or slightly longer until risen, golden brown on top, and a wooden pick inserted in the center comes out clean and dry.
15. Cool on a rack for 3 to 4 minutes.
16. Carefully invert onto a second rack; remove pan and invert cake again to cool right side up.
17. Sift confectioner's sugar over the top.
